---
title: "Mobile Tartu 2024"
date: 2024-06-15
categories: [event]
tags: []
description: "Keynote presentation at Mobile Tartu conference on Future-Proof Transport Planning"
---

I gave a keynote presentation at [Mobile Tartu 2024](https://mobile.terra.tartu.ee/) on Future-Proof Transport Planning.

## PhD School

The conference started with a PhD School, which was a great opportunity to engage with early-career researchers.

## Keynote: Future-Proof Transport Planning

My talk focused on the need for transport planning to adapt to changing circumstances, drawing on experience from the COVID-19 pandemic and the urgent need to decarbonise transport systems.

Key themes included:
- The importance of open source tools in transport planning
- Data-driven approaches to active travel
- Reproducible research methods
- International collaboration in transport research

## Conference highlights

The conference brought together researchers from around the world to discuss:
- Accessibility metrics and methods
- Mobility patterns and behaviour
- Transport modelling and simulation
- Active travel research

Thanks to the organisers for a great event!
